description: Same permissions as the main window, granted to secondary app windows (new windows, detached tabs, the media-controls window). In packaged builds these load the embedded frontend from the localhost asset server (http://127.0.0.1:9877), so IPC must be allowed for that remote origin; in dev they load from the Vite dev server. Serving our OWN embedded frontend over loopback is the app's existing pattern for raw webviews (see assets_server).
